query: Find the methodology sections in these 10 PDFs, extract the evaluation metrics, and compare how they handle formula accuracy.
raw_expression:
AGGREGATE(
  COMPOSE(
    TRANSFORM(I("methodology sections in 10 PDFs"), schema="evaluation metrics"),
    TRANSFORM(I("formula accuracy handling in 10 PDFs"), schema="evaluation metrics"),
    condition="compare handling of formula accuracy"
  ),
  goal="compare formula accuracy handling across PDFs"
)

params.goal: compare formula accuracy handling across PDFs
